name: XO Communications, Inc.
description: XO Communications, LLC was a prominent American telecommunications company that provided advanced IP communications, managed network, and IT infrastructure services to business, large enterprise, and wholesale customers. Founded in 1996 and formerly known as Nextlink Communications, the company offered a wide range of voice, data, and cloud-based networking solutions. XO Communications played a significant role in the telecommunications industry before being acquired by Verizon Communications in 2017. Following the acquisition, its operations and services were integrated into the Verizon business portfolio to enhance connectivity and technological support for enterprise clients across the United States.
